# Roblox MCP

> MCP server and Roblox Studio plugin that lets AI coding agents (Claude Code,
> Cursor, Codex, Gemini) directly control Roblox Studio via natural language.

## What it does

- Execute MCP tools: create/edit scripts, instances, properties, terrain,
  lighting, assets, audio, animation inside Roblox Studio
- Bidirectional project sync between Roblox Studio and local files
- 21 consolidated MCP tools covering the full Roblox Studio API surface

## Installation

Install in 2 steps:
1. Install Roblox Studio plugin (bridge between Studio and AI)
2. Register MCP server: `npx -y @weppy/roblox-mcp`

Supports: Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Cursor, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI

## Tiers

- Basic (Free): MCP tool execution + one-way Studio -> Local sync
- Pro: Bidirectional sync, bulk actions, multi-place support, advanced tools

## Key docs

- Installation: https://github.com/hope1026/roblox-mcp/blob/main/docs/en/installation/README.md
- Tools reference: https://github.com/hope1026/roblox-mcp/blob/main/docs/en/tools/overview.md
- Sync guide: https://github.com/hope1026/roblox-mcp/blob/main/docs/en/sync/overview.md
- Troubleshooting: https://github.com/hope1026/roblox-mcp/blob/main/docs/en/troubleshooting.md
- Compatibility: https://github.com/hope1026/roblox-mcp/blob/main/docs/en/compatibility.md

## Requirements

- Node.js >= 18
- Roblox Studio (Windows 10+ or macOS 12+)
- Any MCP-compatible AI client

- GitHub: https://github.com/hope1026/roblox-mcp
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@weppy/roblox-mcp
